name: SOUTHERN MISSOURI BANCORP, INC.
summary: Southern Missouri Bancorp, Inc. (SMBC) is a bank holding company operating a savings bank that offers mortgage loans, commercial real estate loans, commercial business loans, agricultural real estate and operating loans, adjustable-rate home equity lines of credit, certificates of deposit, savings accounts, NOW accounts, and money market accounts. The company also invests in mortgage-backed securities and investment securities, and utilizes FHLB advances and interest rate swap hedges to manage interest rate risk.
